chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 69 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.02.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Saleem Chohan, Advocate along with applicants Complainant present in person Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. along with ASI Murad Ali Rind PS Piyaro Lund district Tando Allahyar. OMAR SIAL, J.- I have heard applicants’ counsel, learned APG, complainant and I.O of the case. The grievance of the complainant is that they work for a person to whom the applicants had leased out a piece of land. The applicants wanted the possession of that land on the ground that the agreement between the parties had been reached with the lessee of the land. It is alleged that the applicants resorted to aerial firing, attempted to take the complainant with them and set on fire the waste of sugarcane which was lying on the land. At the moment malafide intention cannot be conclusively ruled out as there is apparently contract between the parties and whether the same has been reached or not is yet to be decided. The offence with which the applicants are charged are either bailable or fall within the non-prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Accordingly, in view of above, the interim pre-arrest bail already granted is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
